zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan於1075年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素時，他的父親Pons FitzPons37歲，母親Béatrice de Ponthieu30歲。他於大約1097年與Maud de Pitres在英國格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1129年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan于1075年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素时，他的父亲Pons FitzPons37岁，母亲Béatrice de Ponthieu30岁。他于大约1097年与Maud de Pitres在英国格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1129年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan was born in 1075, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Pons FitzPons, was 37 and his mother, Béatrice de Ponthieu, was 30. He married Maud de Pitres about 1097, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1129, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan est né en 1075, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Pons FitzPons, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Ponthieu, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Pitres environ 1097, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1129, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan 1075 in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pons FitzPons 37 und seine Mutter Béatrice de Ponthieu 30. Er hat um 1097 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England Maud de Pitres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1129 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan è nato il nel 1075 nel Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Pons FitzPons, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de Ponthieu, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Pitres circa 1097, nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1129, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychanが1075年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで生まれた時，父Pons FitzPonsは37歳，母Béatrice de Ponthieuは30歳であった。約1097年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドでMaud de Pitresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1129年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan(이)가 1075년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pons FitzPons(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de Ponthieu(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1097년 영국 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 Maud de Pitres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan nasceu em 1075, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Pons FitzPons, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Ponthieu, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Pitres aproximadamente 1097, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1129, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan родился в 1075 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Pons FitzPons было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Ponthieu, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Pitres около 1097 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1129 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan nació en 1075, en Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Pons FitzPons, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Ponthieu, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Maud de Pitres aproximadamente 1097, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1129, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
